segments.text: It's been pretty tough to keep extending that lead though, you know?
segments.original_text: 上げていくっていうのがちょっと難しいですよね

segments.text: They've been holding the advantage this whole time
segments.original_text: さっきからリードを取って

segments.text: When their opponent brings the pressure
segments.original_text: のどきごくが攻めてくるところに対して

segments.text: That's kind of the dynamic we're looking at
segments.original_text: やっていくみたいなところがあるんで

full_text: It's been pretty tough to keep extending that lead though, you know? They've been holding the advantage this whole time. When their opponent brings the pressure, that's kind of the dynamic we're looking at.
